Operation 'listEvents' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description is completely missing. Added details about what filters are available, the return format (array of Event objects), and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand filtering capabilities and response structure.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of events from the shared agenda with optional filtering capabilities. Supports filtering by date range, location, category, and other parameters. Returns an array of Event objects. Does not require authentication for public events.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is completely missing. Added details about what filters are available, the return format (array of Event objects), and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand filtering capabilities and response structure.

message: Operation 'createEvent' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is missing entirely. Added information about authentication requirement, input schema context, return value, and side effects (event visibility and calendar addition) to enable AI agents to understand the full operation lifecycle and impact.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new event in the shared agenda. Requires authentication. Accepts event details including title, description, date/time, location, and recurrence configuration via EventCreateRequest. Returns the created Event object with assigned ID. The event is immediately added to the calendar and visible to community members based on visibility settings.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing entirely. Added information about authentication requirement, input schema context, return value, and side effects (event visibility and calendar addition) to enable AI agents to understand the full operation lifecycle and impact.

message: Operation 'updateEvent' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description mentions access control but lacks details about input format, return value, and partial update support. Enhanced to clarify what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, and what is returned to help AI agents understand update capabilities and authorization requirements.

data.current_description: Modify an event. Requires admin or owner access.
data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing event in the shared agenda. Requires authentication and admin or owner access to the event. Accepts event updates via EventUpdateRequest including title, description, date/time, location, and recurrence configuration. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Event object.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description mentions access control but lacks details about input format, return value, and partial update support. Enhanced to clarify what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, and what is returned to help AI agents understand update capabilities and authorization requirements.

message: Operation 'getCurrentUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added authentication requirement (Bearer token), return value details (User object with specific fields), and context about what profile information is included to enable AI agents to understand authentication prerequisites and response structure.

data.current_summary: Get the current authenticated user profile
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user. Requires valid Bearer token authentication. Returns the User object containing profile details including username, email, preferences, and account settings.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added authentication requirement (Bearer token), return value details (User object with specific fields), and context about what profile information is included to enable AI agents to understand authentication prerequisites and response structure.
